name: auto_production_two_peers_different_rules
description: Two peers with different production rules served in parallel. 'steady_peer' produces every 5 slots starting at 100; 'sparse_peer' produces at specific slots [102, 107, 117]. Advancing to slot 120 from start_slot 99 causes steady_peer to produce at {100, 105, 110, 115, 120} (5 blocks) and sparse_peer to produce at {102, 107, 117} (3 blocks). Each client receives its peer's production pattern.

peers.description: Produces one block every 5 slots starting at 100
Produces at three specific slots only
